headline: CME Group to Launch Treasury Link, Enhancing U.S. Treasury Spread Trading Between Cash and Futures Markets
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced that it will launch Treasury Link, an industry-first functionality to seamlessly connect the world's largest U.S. Treasury futures and cash liquidity pools. The new service will enable transparent, centralized spread trading between CBOT Treasury futures and BrokerTec cash Treasuries on CME Globex and is expected to launch in Q4 2026, pending regulatory review.

headline: CME Group's New Agriculture Index Delivers Unified Price Benchmark for the Global Farm Economy
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced the launch of its Agriculture Index, a broad-based price benchmark designed to track the aggregate performance of five sectors fundamental to the global farm economy.

headline: Competition And Weaker Trading Volumes Are Weighing On CME Group (CME) Stock
summary: CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) is one of the 10 Best Major Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On July 6, Analyst Alex Kramm from UBS reiterated a Hold rating on CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) while cutting his price target on the stock. The analyst lowered his price target on the shares from $310 to $260. […]
